tool.name: xxe_tester
tool.description: Test for XXE (XML External Entity) injection vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test basic XXE payloads on endpoint - Generate out-of-band XXE payload - Generate specific XXE payload - Test endpoint with custom payload - Test file disclosure, SSRF, and OOB techniques

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test_basic: Test basic XXE payloads on endpoint - test_oob: Generate out-of-band XXE payload - generate_payload: Generate specific XXE payload - test_endpoint: Test endpoint with custom payload

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for test_basic, test_endpoint.

parameter.name: payload_type
parameter.description: Type of payload: basic_file, basic_http, xinclude, soap, oob

parameter.name: callback_url
parameter.description: Callback URL for OOB attacks. Required for test_oob.

tool.examples:
# Test basic XXE
test_basic https://example.com/api/xml
# Generate OOB payload
test_oob https://callback.com
# Generate specific payload
generate_payload basic_file /etc/passwd
# Test endpoint with XInclude
test_endpoint https://example.com/api/xml xinclude
